description: Style Notetonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out!Product DetailsCrafted in fine fabric and featuring a cowl neckline, this maroon and black dress has cap sleeves, a low waist with an elasticated knitted bottomMaterial and Care40% rayon, 30% acrylic, 28% nylon and 2% spandexHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
